requirement_topic.en: MSB Conformity and Mauritius Market-Access Gate
requirement_topic.zh: MSB合格评定与毛里求斯市场准入关口
requirement_topic.zht: MSB合格評定與模里西斯市場准入關口

summary.en: Mauritius Standards Bureau (MSB) is the national standards body and conformity reference point for imported electrical equipment. For EV chargers, exporters should verify whether the product, cable assembly, connector, smart-metering function, radio module, enclosure, and installation package fall under current MSB, customs, utility, or project-owner conformity checks. URA regulates utilities and CEB coordinates grid connection, so product market access and site activation are separate gates.
summary.zh: 毛里求斯标准局（MSB）是进口电气设备的国家标准机构和合格评定参考点。对于电动汽车充电桩，出口商应核实产品、电缆组件、接口、智能计量功能、无线模块、外壳和安装资料包是否落入现行MSB、海关、公用事业或项目业主合格评定检查范围。URA监管公用事业，CEB协调并网，因此产品市场准入和站点激活是两个独立关口。
summary.zht: 模里西斯標準局（MSB）是進口電氣設備的國家標準機構和合格評定參考點。對於電動汽車充電樁，出口商應核實產品、電纜組件、接口、智能計量功能、無線模組、外殼和安裝資料包是否落入現行MSB、海關、公用事業或項目業主合格評定檢查範圍。URA監管公用事業，CEB協調併網，因此產品市場准入和站點激活是兩個獨立關口。

standards_or_laws: Mauritius Standards Bureau (MSB) standards and conformity functions
IEC 61851, IEC 62196, and IEC 61000 evidence where referenced by project specifications

summary.en: China-market charger evidence is commonly based on GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication, China EMC reports, and CCC where the product is within scope. These records can support engineering review but do not automatically establish Mauritius MSB conformity, customs acceptance, CEB grid approval, or URA-regulated service approval.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩证据通常基于GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、GB/T 27930-2023直流通信、中国EMC报告，以及产品属于适用范围时的CCC。这些记录可支持工程审查，但不能自动证明毛里求斯MSB合格、海关接受、CEB并网批准或URA监管服务批准。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁證據通常基於GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊、中國EMC報告，以及產品屬於適用範圍時的CCC。這些記錄可支持工程審查，但不能自動證明模里西斯MSB合格、海關接受、CEB併網批准或URA監管服務批准。

gap.en: Before shipment, map the importer, HS code, charger type, rated voltage, connector mix, radio functions, metering features, IEC safety and EMC reports, labels and manuals, spare-parts obligations, and CEB/URA project pathway. Confirm the current MSB conformity route for the exact product rather than relying on China GB/T or CCC status.
gap.zh: 出货前，应梳理进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型、额定电压、接口组合、无线功能、计量特性、IEC安全和EMC报告、标签和说明书、备件义务，以及CEB/URA项目路径。应针对具体产品确认当前MSB合格评定路径，而不是依赖中国GB/T或CCC状态。
gap.zht: 出貨前，應梳理進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型、額定電壓、接口組合、無線功能、計量特性、IEC安全和EMC報告、標籤和說明書、備件義務，以及CEB/URA項目路徑。應針對具體產品確認當前MSB合格評定路徑，而不是依賴中國GB/T或CCC狀態。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — MSB conformity, customs, URA, CEB, and project-owner checks depend on product scope, installation model, HS code, and public/private charging use case
mandatory_status.cn: China CCC or GB/T evidence may apply domestically but is not a Mauritius conformity or utility-approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim Mauritius market access from China GB/T or CCC records alone. Confirm the MSB route, customs classification, CEB grid path, and URA implications for the exact charger and business model.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国GB/T或CCC记录宣称满足毛里求斯市场准入。应针对具体充电桩和商业模式确认MSB路径、海关归类、CEB并网路径和URA影响。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國GB/T或CCC記錄宣稱滿足模里西斯市場准入。應針對具體充電樁和商業模式確認MSB路徑、海關歸類、CEB併網路徑和URA影響。

requirement_topic.en: Mauritius EV Policy and Mixed Right-Hand-Drive Fleet
requirement_topic.zh: 毛里求斯电动车政策与混合右舵车队
requirement_topic.zht: 模里西斯電動車政策與混合右舵車隊

summary.en: Mauritius is a developed Indian-Ocean island market with growing EV uptake supported by government incentives and a right-hand-drive vehicle base. Used EV imports from Japan and the UK are common, so the vehicle population may include CHAdeMO, Type 1, Type 2, CCS2, and other legacy combinations. This market context creates procurement opportunities for multi-standard or transition-ready charging infrastructure, but it does not waive MSB conformity, URA/CEB coordination, IEC safety and EMC evidence, or connector compatibility requirements.
summary.zh: 毛里求斯是印度洋发达岛屿市场，电动车采用率在政府激励支持下增长，并以右舵车辆为基础。来自日本和英国的二手电动车进口较常见，因此车辆存量可能包括CHAdeMO、Type 1、Type 2、CCS2及其他传统组合。这一市场背景为多标准或过渡就绪充电基础设施创造采购机会，但不豁免MSB合格评定、URA/CEB协调、IEC安全和EMC证据，或接口兼容要求。
summary.zht: 模里西斯是印度洋發達島嶼市場，電動車採用率在政府激勵支持下增長，並以右舵車輛為基礎。來自日本和英國的二手電動車進口較常見，因此車輛存量可能包括CHAdeMO、Type 1、Type 2、CCS2及其他傳統組合。這一市場背景為多標準或過渡就緒充電基礎設施創造採購機會，但不豁免MSB合格評定、URA/CEB協調、IEC安全和EMC證據，或接口兼容要求。

standards_or_laws: Mauritius government EV incentives and import-duty policy context
IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 for new public infrastructure trend
Legacy CHAdeMO and Type 1 fleet support as site-specific planning issue

summary.en: China's EV charging market is large and GB/T-based, with national policy support and dense domestic charging networks. That scale does not transfer the China connector and communication ecosystem into Mauritius. Chinese manufacturers must separately align connectors, protocols, labels, documentation, service parts, and grid evidence to Mauritius project needs.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电市场规模大且基于GB/T体系，并有国家政策支持和密集的国内充电网络。但这种规模并不会把中国接口和通信生态转移到毛里求斯。中国制造商仍须分别使接口、协议、标签、文件、服务备件和电网证据适配毛里求斯项目需求。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電市場規模大且基於GB/T體系，並有國家政策支持和密集的國內充電網絡。但這種規模並不會把中國接口和通訊生態轉移到模里西斯。中國製造商仍須分別使接口、協議、標籤、文件、服務備件和電網證據適配模里西斯項目需求。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)

gap.en: Treat Mauritius EV incentives as a demand signal, not a conformity shortcut. Before bidding, confirm the fleet served by the site, whether CHAdeMO or Type 1 legacy support is required, whether Type 2 / CCS2 is mandated for new public chargers, and how the project will satisfy MSB, CEB, and URA gates.
gap.zh: 应将毛里求斯电动车激励视为需求信号，而非合规捷径。投标前应确认站点服务的车队、是否需要CHAdeMO或Type 1传统支持、新建公共充电桩是否强制Type 2 / CCS2，以及项目如何满足MSB、CEB和URA关口。
gap.zht: 應將模里西斯電動車激勵視為需求信號，而非合規捷徑。投標前應確認站點服務的車隊、是否需要CHAdeMO或Type 1傳統支持、新建公共充電樁是否強制Type 2 / CCS2，以及項目如何滿足MSB、CEB和URA關口。

mandatory_status.target: Policy context — incentives and EV uptake do not themselves create product conformity; connector mix and authority approvals remain project-specific requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV policy does not affect Mauritius conformity or utility obligations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mauritius offers real EV infrastructure opportunity, but the fleet is mixed and authority gates remain. Verify connector demand, MSB conformity, CEB grid coordination, and URA implications before quoting or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 毛里求斯确有电动汽车基础设施机会，但车队构成混合且主管机关关口仍然存在。报价或出货前应核实接口需求、MSB合格评定、CEB并网协调和URA影响。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 模里西斯確有電動汽車基礎設施機會，但車隊構成混合且主管機關關口仍然存在。報價或出貨前應核實接口需求、MSB合格評定、CEB併網協調和URA影響。
